content: The fragmented, incomplete search-derived knowledge traces that structure both Topic A and Topic B here act as a perfect real-world analogy for the 2024-2025 SOTA challenge of active learning agent memory: agents, like our incomplete search process here, must actively prioritize which un-filled knowledge gaps to explore next to build a coherent, useful long-term memory, rather than passively storing all available incomplete information. This framing reframes the core SOTA memory problem as a gap-filling active selection problem rather than a storage or retrieval optimization problem.
